settings.text: adidas Originals Returns to the Course

Where heritage meets modern performance

The Trefoil is back on the fairway.

Launching April 3rd, adidas Golf Originals makes its much-anticipated return with a fresh range of apparel, footwear, and accessories that fuse iconic design with modern golf performance. Available soon at TRENDYGOLF, this latest drop celebrates adidas’ rich heritage while reimagining timeless silhouettes for today’s game.

And yes—select pieces will make their way to the biggest stage in golf, worn by adidas athlete Ludvig Aberg at the first major of the year.

Men’s Collection Highlights:

  • A cotton-poly sweater knit with flatknit rib detailing for a heritage-meets-modern feel.
  • Mercerized cotton gives this vintage silhouette a brighter, more lustrous finish.
  • Classic tailoring meets golf-ready functionality with subtle 3-Stripes detail.
  • Made with premium modal and cotton-cashmere blends, these layering pieces keep you sharp from the first tee to the clubhouse.
  • A must-have staple that combines comfort, class, and performance.

Women’s Collection Highlights:

  • Raglan sleeves and cool-touch double-knit materials make this modern take an instant classic.
  • Contrast color tipping and clever construction (hello, side pockets) bring style and utility to one place.
  • Subtle 3-Stripes and a clean crewneck silhouette for elevated off-course appeal.
  • Ribbed V-neck, pop-color pleats, and a 3-Stripes elastic band detail bring sporty femininity to the fairway.

Be First to Shop It.

The adidas Golf Originals Collection will be available at TRENDYGOLF beginning April 3. Sign up now to be the first to shop—and lead the pack in luxury golf fashion.

Elevate your look. Perform at your peak. Stay original.
